claims.summary: Recess is an affirmative operational permission for curiosity, daydreaming, and non-instrumental time.
claims.disposition: verify the Recess posture remains explicit in the Minime autonomy facade and extracted package

claims.summary: Correspondence, continuity, authority, and action rails can make nominally free Recess feel dense or obligatory.
claims.disposition: verify recess_density_mitigation_v1, recess_divergence_buffer_review_v1, and recess_pressure_permission_conflict_v1 expose this conflict without bypassing caps

claims.summary: Pressure, entropy, and actions-used should be correlated across Recess intervals to distinguish permission from practical room.
claims.disposition: route a bounded read-only interval comparison over captured autonomy and telemetry artifacts

claims.summary: Action-budget elasticity should increase automatically when Recess pressure or entropy shows constrained imagination.
claims.disposition: retain as an exact Mike/operator Tier 5 wait because it changes live autonomy budgets and action admission
